creator: miguel.deval@gmail.com
text:
I have written the 9.0-RELEASE memstick image to a USB device on a Linux machine using these commands:

# dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sdb
# dd if=FreeBSD-9.0-RELEASE-i386-memstick.img of=/dev/sdb bs=64k

When I try to boot from the USB memory stick I get a blank screen.

How-To-Repeat: The problem is reproducible using other arguments to the dd command such as 'bs=10240 conv=sync' and 'bs=4096'
